name: Double-Headed Dino King Rex
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>頭</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>キング・レックス
desc: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Double-Headed Dino King Rex" once per turn this way. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 monster on the field with less ATK than the total ATK of all Dinosaur monsters you control; destroy it. You can only use this effect of "Double-Headed Dino King Rex" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Double-Headed Dino King Rex" once per turn this way. You can only use this effect of "Double-Headed Dino King Rex" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
